test_result.details: While glyph entropy (3.86) approximates the expected 4.0, the exceptionally high hapax ratio (0.701) and low Zipf exponent (0.895) strongly contradict a simple substitution cipher on natural Latin, which would preserve word frequency distributions and show lower hapax ratios (~40-50%).
